title: Random Crafting Recipe
description: Yes, this mod will mess up your crafting recipe every 10 minute (even modpack)
body:
Yeah, you read that right. This mod will make your crafting recipe mess up every 10 minute (working with modpack too...even JEI will supported)


```
/randomcraft shuffle
```
to force your crafting recipe change


```
/randomcraft next
```
to check when mod will change your recipe

For now, contact me on [Facebook](https://fb.hachizuorigami.site/) or Discord: @therealrimurutempest

![This is what happened when you run both command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86d05a5f4ad0ca4493cb66710dede6965f6c4d7c.png)
